title: Fix SQL Query to Extract Unique Product Categories Correctly Sorted with Case Insensitivity

statement.markdown: Given a table `products` with columns `id`, `name`, and `category`, write a SQL query to extract unique product categories in a case-insensitive manner, sorted in ascending order. The query should also handle empty strings as a valid category.
statement.outputFormat: List of unique product categories in ascending order
statement.notes: The table may contain duplicate categories.

constraints.description: Number of products in the table

examples.input:
products (id, name, category)
1, Apple, Fruits
2, Banana, Fruits
3, Carrot, Vegetables
4, Donut, Junk Food
examples.explanation: The query should extract unique product categories in a case-insensitive manner, sorted in ascending order.

hints.text: Use the `LOWER` function to convert category names to lowercase

editorial.title: Editorial: Extracting Unique Product Categories
editorial.intuition: The query should use a combination of `DISTINCT`, `ORDER BY`, and `LOWER` to extract unique product categories in a case-insensitive manner.
editorial.bruteForce: A brute-force approach would involve using a subquery to extract unique categories and then sorting the result set.
editorial.optimalSolution: SELECT DISTINCT LOWER(category) FROM products ORDER BY LOWER(category) ASC
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: The query uses `DISTINCT` to eliminate duplicate categories, `LOWER` to convert category names to lowercase, and `ORDER BY` to sort the result set in ascending order.
commonMistakes: Forgetting to use `DISTINCT` to eliminate duplicate categories
editorial.timeComplexity: O(n log n) due to sorting

buggyStarterCode.javascript: SELECT DISTINCT category FROM products ORDER BY category ASC

functionSignature.javascript: SELECT DISTINCT category FROM products ORDER BY category ASC

solutions.javascript: // Solution: SELECT DISTINCT LOWER(category) FROM products ORDER BY LOWER(category) ASC

testCases.input:
products (id, name, category)
1, Apple, Fruits
2, Banana, Fruits
3, Carrot, Vegetables
4, Donut, Junk Food
